positive: A vibrant, stylized graphic depiction of a cosmic whale breaching through nebula clouds. The whale should have strong, clean silhouettes, adorned with bioluminescent, geometric patterns resembling constellations and deep-sea flora. Background elements include swirling purple, turquoise, and deep indigo space colors, contrasted by bright, glowing energy trails emanating from the whale's mouth. Composition should be centralized and dynamic, maximizing visual impact for a centered apparel print. Style: Neo-art Nouveau mixed with abstract scientific illustration, high contrast, vector art aesthetics, perfect symmetry, ultra-detailed, print-ready, maximalist.
